flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Yale University fell 34% between 2021 and 2024 (87.7% → 57.5%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Yale University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($60.0k → $67.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Yale University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($60.0k → $67.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Yale University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.2% → 0.0%).
